description: Maps Cubase template plugins to available Faust processors or required approximations.

mappings.notes: Current Faust processor approximates C1-style compression; exact preset mapping still needed.
Standalone soft gate/expander approximation tuned from the Classic gate snapshot.
Kept for legacy/template_d and calibration research only. User-confirmed A/B/C active chains do not use the red-boxed DeEsser inserts.
Dedicated focused high-band sibilance controller tuned from the Voice-over snapshot.
Template-specific vocal/music/bus EQ approximations exist; FabFilter binary state is still not fully decoded.
Kept as an experimental approximation only. The active mix chains skip it because Faust C6 renders have caused noise/instability; user previously removed C6 for the same reason.
Also used as accomp_l2_stereo for accompaniment chain.
Mono lookahead limiter tuned from the Voice preset threshold, ceiling, and release values.
Group send level is confirmed post-fader; internal RVerb parameters are extracted.
Group send level is confirmed post-fader; internal SuperTap parameters are extracted.
XML parameters are extracted; parameter-name mapping should be checked against official manual.
Low-frequency harmonic enhancer tuned from the Acappella Bass Voice snapshot.
Dynamic EQ approximation using readable frequency anchors from the exported F6 snapshot.
Red-boxed/inactive in the user-confirmed Cubase insert screenshot for A/B/C; do not implement or calibrate.
Slow transparent gain rider tuned from the extracted target/range/sensitivity values.
High-shelf plus subtle excitation approximation guided by the exported macro amount.
Stereo glue/tone/saturation macro approximation guided by the extracted preset.
Current template D uses master_softclipper. User confirmed templates A/B/C do not use SoftClipper.
User confirmed templates do not use Cubase EQ as an active plugin.
